Petition For Distribution On Waiver Of Accounting, And Petition For Allowance Of Statutory Compensation
Off Calendar Mar-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Distribution On Waiver Of Accounting, And Petition For Allowance Of Statutory Compensation
Off Calendar Mar-02-2016 Continued To Mar-23-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Malone for (Petitioner) Anne Winks.

The Court stated that no objections have been filed and that we are here due to the lost will. Mr. Malone stated that he has nothing to add, everything was fully stated in the declaration, that they looked hard for the will, that Anne had found the original will and turned it over to the attorney and now it is lost. The Court granted the petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary, signing the order in open court.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
